text:
There once was a cat who discovered she could read minds.

She'd hear little thoughts every day, every night. How their days went, their disappointments—

once, she heard a wish for chocolate chip cookies. She thought it delightful. So, one morning, she decided to give that cat three cookies.

Another day had a thought about a rainy day at the zoo. She knew just what that critter wanted.

She thought, "There's a sloth," put on a funny hat. "Hmm, a chocolate-covered peanut butter?"

She made some.

That night, back at the zoo, she saw it!

The sloth ate those cookies.

She got so good friends like that.

Sometimes she'd just chat.

Sometimes it was about stars.

But she liked getting ideas like that. She found life really exciting that way.<|endoftext|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|>
